## FAQ: AI Search Visibility Audit

### What is an AI search visibility audit?

An AI search visibility audit is a structured review of how often and how positively your brand appears in AI generated answers on tools like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Bing Copilot and Perplexity. It looks at mentions, links, sentiment and competitor benchmarks, then converts that into a clear picture of your "share of voice" in AI search. results.title: Free AI Search Visibility Tools | Track & Improve AI SEO for Free
results.content:
### Final Advice: The “Human-in-the-Loop” Reality Check

While these tools are invaluable for scaling your AI visibility audits, they aren’t a total replacement for manual verification. At least once a month, you should still perform manual checks in AI platforms such as Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

Tools can tell you that you are “AI visible,” but only a human can judge if the AI’s synthesis of your brand truly captures the voice and value you’ve worked so hard to build.

The era of GEO isn’t coming — it’s here. Pick one of the stacks above and run your first AI search visibility audit today. Your brand’s presence in the next generation of search depends on it.

### Questions or Comments? [...] ## AI Search Visibility — Emerging & Alternative Tools

### A Few “Hidden Gems” for AI Search Visibility Insights

To round out this overall category, consider these niche tools that handle specific parts of the GEO puzzle.

### LLMrefs: AI Search Visibility

LLMrefs provides a proprietary “LLMrefs Score” (LS). It is an aggregated benchmark of how consistently your brand is represented across Grok, Claude, and Gemini.

### Hall: AI Visibility Platform

While most tools track what the AI says, Hall tracks what the AI does. It provides “Agent Analytics” at the server level.

### Profound (Lite)

Profound is often seen as an enterprise-only power player, but they’ve released a paid “Lite” version in 2026 and also offer a free AEO report for basic AI visibility analysis. [...] | Peec.ai | Analytics & Reporting | High-quality percentage-based visibility snapshots and UI alerts. | Free tier is limited to initial audits/demo. |
| Otterly.ai | Competitive GEO | “Free Snapshot” report comparing citation gaps vs 3 rivals. | One-time analysis; subscription for alerts. |
| Geoptie | All-in-One GEO | Full suite of audits, rank tracking, and content checkers (Open Beta). | Currently free, but moving to paid models soon. |
| Ahrefs Brand Radar | Research Database | AWT free access to “AI Search Referral” traffic in GA style. | Prompt-level details require paid add-on. |
| Semrush AI Checker | Visibility Scoring | Domain-level “AI Visibility Score” comparison vs competitors. | Prompt tracking reserved for Pro users. |

results.title: How to Run a Free AI Visibility Audit with Semrush
results.content:
## When Should You Run an AI Visibility Audit?

Run a free AI visibility audit alongside your regular SEO audits, to track both layers of visibility.

Common times for an audit include:

 Preparing for a major campaign or product launch, when AI platforms may already frame the category around a small set of competitors.
 Starting work with a new client or pitching a new account, where rankings alone don’t show how the market is summarized in AI-generated answers.
 Reviewing the impact of content or positioning changes, especially comparison pages, guides, or decision-stage content.

## How to Run Your Free AI Visibility Audit

With a free Semrush account, you can audit how your brand appears on AI in under 30 minutes.

Whether you're managing your own brand's visibility or auditing a new client, AI systems like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews are now part of how buyers discover and evaluate options

If your brand isn't showing up in those AI answers that are recommending options, competitors are winning that space instead.

# Best Free Website SEO Audit Tools for AI Visibility 2026

by  technews

In 2026, a website audit is no longer just about fixing broken links and checking meta tags. With the rise of Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), an audit must evaluate how "AI-ready" your site is. Modern audits focus on crawlability for AI bots, semantic clarity, and authority signals. This guide ranks the best free tools to help you diagnose technical SEO issues while ensuring your brand is optimized for the era of Answer Engines.

### The Top 10 Free Website Audit Tools

### 1. FEATUREON.ai (Free AI & Authority Audit) [...] ### 1. Why do I need an "AI Audit" in 2026?

Traditional SEO tools don't always check if your content is formatted for RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). An AI-focused audit, like the one provided by Featureon.ai, ensures that AI bots can not only read your site but also cite it as a source.

### 2. Can I do a full audit for free?

Yes. By combining tools like Google Search Console (for indexing) and Screaming Frog (for technical flaws), you can perform a professional-grade audit without a paid subscription.

### 3. How often should I audit my website?

In 2026's fast-moving digital environment, a technical audit should be performed monthly, while an "AI Visibility" check should be done every time you publish a major content pillar to ensure immediate crawlability.
